party.emptyBody: Add a character to start drawing.

character.resetDeck: Reset deck to start of scenario

settings.languageSub: Game text (perks, conditions) stays in English in this version
settings.unlockedStatus: {{unlocked}} of {{total}} unlockable classes revealed. Unlockable classes are hidden by their code name on the character picker until you tap to reveal them.
settings.relockBody: All unlockable classes will be hidden behind their code names again. Existing characters are unaffected.
settings.revealBody: This spoils the names of every unlockable Gloomhaven, Frosthaven, and fan-expansion class. Only do this if you don't mind seeing them.
settings.aboutBody: Attack Deck is an unofficial fan-made companion app for Gloomhaven, Frosthaven, Jaws of the Lion, and community fan expansions including The Crimson Scales and CCUG custom classes. Gloomhaven and Frosthaven are trademarks of Cephalofair Games. The Crimson Scales is a fan project by Bas Hoogeboom and contributors; CCUG classes are individually authored by community members. This app is not affiliated with Cephalofair or any fan-expansion authors. Class data is rendered from primitives only; no copyrighted artwork is bundled.
settings.gameDataBody: {{count}} classes bundled. Perk data adapted from Gloomhaven Secretariat (github.com/Lurkars/gloomhavensecretariat), itself a community fork of Gloomhaven Helper. Some Frosthaven class-specific perk effects are summarised as ★ in card art — see the perk description on each character screen for the full rule.
settings.gameDataWarn: The deck engine is unit-tested but individual perk data may contain transcription errors. Please verify against the printed rulebook before relying on results in competitive play.
settings.creditsDesign: Game design: Isaac Childres / Cephalofair Games.
settings.creditsData: Perk data: Lurkars + community contributors to Gloomhaven Secretariat.
settings.creditsApp: App: built with React Native + Expo.
